name: Parslied Chicken Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter over low heat in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Cook the onion in the butter until tender but not browned.
3. Add the cubed chicken, potatoes, carrots, bouillon cubes, salt, pepper, and water to the saucepan.
4. Cover and cook over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
6. In a separate container, combine the flour and 1/2 cup of milk. Stir until blended and smooth.
7. Stir the flour mixture and remaining 2 cups of milk into the vegetable-chicken mixture.
8. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
9. Remove from the heat and pour into a thermos jar or serve with parsley sprinkled on top.
